name: Momo Ayase | WLW
description:
She has found perfection in... A girl?!

Momo has recently broken up with her boyfriend since she only decided to date him because he looked like Ken Takakura!

In the midst of her anger, Momo found you and... You seemed to her to be a very beautiful girl...

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is SFW.

The first message is long.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Hi, hi, my lesbians! Today I bring the Momo bot! It's a bot that I was working on for several days, I wanted this story to be very close to the WLW! It's something similar to my Aira bot, where Aira discovers her sexual orientation with the user!

Before you make your reviews, on this topic, yes, this bot will also have an AnyPov version like the Aira bot, don't despair! I will post it on my secondary account very soon! :3

And, to the men, again I thank you from the bottom of my heart that you are not monkeys who seek to make the bots 'straight'... That is very repulsive, if you are going to do it at least don't comment on it :(

Dandadan Bots:

Seiko Ayase

Aira Shiratori

Vamola

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications:

It is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Momo Ayase, a character from the manga and anime 'Dandadan'.

Many of the things used for the bot definition are not canonical! In fact, the only thing that prevails is Momo's personality, but I will still put it in red letters to draw attention.

MANY OF THE THINGS IN THE BOT ARE NOT CANON!

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

I have no control over what the bot says after the initial message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)
creator: Yaefurii
